title: Fluffy Silky Korean Peanut Cookies Dessert Bowl
description: A yeasty, silky, kid-friendly Korean dessert featuring peanut cookies and double-rise bread, inspired by Gyeonggi Province.

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: Use organic sugar for vegan option.

ingredients.name: Peanut Butter
ingredients.notes: Choose creamy natural peanut butter for best texture.

ingredients.name: Peanut Cookies
ingredients.notes: Use store-bought or homemade peanut cookies.

ingredients.name: Fruit (such as strawberries, blueberries)
ingredients.notes: Choose seasonal fruit for best flavor.

ingredients.name: Maple Syrup
ingredients.notes: Grade B maple syrup for rich flavor.

ingredients.name: Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: Choose full-fat coconut milk for creamy texture.

instructions: Combine warm almond milk and yeast in a small bowl to activate yeast.
